name: Brain CT Angiography
description: Brain CT angiography for evaluation of intracranial and extracranial vasculature

findings.technique: CT angiography of the head and neck was performed following intravenous contrast administration.
findings.comparison: No prior CTA studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Intracranial Arteries
sections.content: Intracranial internal carotid arteries: [patent / no stenosis / no aneurysm]. MCA, ACA, and PCA: [normal caliber / no stenosis / no occlusion].

sections.name: Circle of Willis
sections.content: Circle of Willis is [complete / intact / no aneurysm / no fenestration].

sections.name: Posterior Circulation
sections.content: Vertebral arteries: [patent / equal caliber / no dissection]. Basilar artery: [patent / no stenosis / no aneurysm].

sections.name: Venous Sinuses
sections.content: Dural venous sinuses are [patent / no thrombosis / no filling defect]. Superior sagittal sinus is normal.

impression:
1. No aneurysm identified.
2. No large vessel occlusion.
3. Normal CTA of the brain.
author: RadReport Templates
